data.title: Xcel Energy 2026 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call
data.description: Xcel Energy, a publicly-traded company listed as XEL on the NASDAQ, is set to discuss their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 in a conference call on April 30. The earnings report for this period will be revealed before the market opens on the same day, with the call scheduled to commence at 9:00 a.m. Central Time. Participants are encouraged to dial in at least 10 minutes before the call begins and follow the instructions provided by the operator. For those in the United States, the toll-free dial-in number is 1-800-715-9871, while international participants can utilize the international toll dial-in number.

data.title: RioCan Real Estate Investment Trust Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Toronto-based RioCan Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: REI.UN) is set to unveil its financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2026 on Monday, May 4. The results will cover the period ending March 31, 2026. The company has announced that the data will be made public after the market's closure. Subsequently, a conference call with the management is scheduled for the following day, Tuesday, May 5, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern time. Interested individuals can participate in the call and are advised to pre-register in advance.

NASA: Flight termination system no longer a constraint, it is go for launch
NASA: Range is go on Artemis

data.title: Dormie Network Unveils Plans for New Clubhouse at Victoria National
data.description: In Lincoln, Nebraska, Dormie Network has revealed intentions to construct a new clubhouse at Victoria National in Newburgh, Indiana. This initiative underscores Dormie Network's dedication to improving the member experience and aligning amenities with the standards of a golf course that secured the top position as the Best Course in Indiana according to Golf Digest. General Manager of Victoria National, Brad Wilson, expressed, “Victoria National has significantly progressed since its acquisition by Dormie Network in 2018,” highlighting its recognition as a Top 100 course in the region.

data.title: New leveraged crypto ETFs introduced for three altcoins by Volatility Shares, expanding its offering to smaller digital assets.
data.description: Volatility Shares, known for introducing the initial leveraged crypto fund in the United States, is broadening its selection to include smaller digital assets. This move signifies a strategic expansion in their offerings to cater to a wider range of cryptocurrencies beyond the larger, more established ones. The company's decision is set to provide investors with increased opportunities to diversify their portfolios and potentially capitalize on the volatile nature of these smaller digital assets. This initiative reflects the growing interest and demand for alternative investment options within the cryptocurrency space. The move by Volatility Shares marks a significant development in the market as it seeks to capture a segment of the crypto market that has been gaining traction. Investors will now have access to a more extensive array of digital assets through the company's expanded roster, potentially opening up new avenues for investment and trading in the fast-evolving crypto landscape. This strategic decision by Volatility Shares aligns with the dynamic nature of the crypto market and aims to meet the changing needs of investors looking to explore opportunities beyond mainstream cryptocurrencies.

ESTÉE LAUDER TO RECORD $1.367 BLN IN CUMULATIVE RESTRUCTURING & OTHER CHARGES THROUGH MARCH 31, 2026; EXPECTS TOTAL CHARGES BETWEEN $1,200 MLN & $1,600 MLN BEFORE TAX – SEC FILING

data.title: DataJoint Enables Seamless Migration of CWL Pipelines to Its Governed, Reproducible Scientific Data Infrastructure
data.description: In Houston, on April 1, 2026, DataJoint revealed they have developed a new feature allowing researchers to incorporate existing workflows into a foundation that is abundant in provenance and compatible with artificial intelligence without the need to begin from the start. This capability includes the conversion of Common Workflow Language (CWL) pipelines into DataJoint pipelines.

data.title: Imbed Biosciences Announces CMS Assignment of HCPCS Code A2040 for Microlyte® PainGuard™
data.description: Imbed Biosciences has introduced a new code assignment to facilitate transparent billing and enhance claims reporting for their synthetic antimicrobial wound matrix. This innovation also includes localized, non-opioid pain management. The announcement was made in Middleton, Wisconsin on April 1, 2026. This development will support clarity in billing processes and claims reporting, benefiting both healthcare providers and patients.

data.title: Premier Radiology Services Acquires Global Imaging Solutions to Strengthen Teleradiology Coverage and Subspecialty Expertise
data.description: Premier Radiology Services has recently acquired Global Imaging Solutions (GLOBIS), a prominent teleradiology group specializing in providing subspecialty imaging services to outpatient imaging centers and orthopedic practices. This acquisition enhances Premier’s capabilities by expanding its subspecialized services and reinforcing its support for advanced diagnostic imaging requirements across the country. The addition of GLOBIS is a significant move for Premier and marks a new chapter in its growth trajectory.

data.title: Guardian Completes Integration With FINEOS to Expand Digital Capabilities and Deliver a Simplified Leave Experience
data.description: In New York, Guardian Life Insurance Company of America has fully integrated FINEOS AdminSuite for Employee Benefits into Guardian Absence Solutions™ to offer family-friendly benefits to employers of all sizes. This move aims to drive utilization of high-impact benefits and provide a seamless leave planning experience for businesses. The integration caters to businesses of varying scales, ensuring a comprehensive absence management solution.

data.title: The Estée Lauder Companies Fully Establishes Its “One ELC” Operating Model and Reaches Milestone in Its Profit Recovery and Growth Plan
data.description: Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) has appointed WPP as its inaugural global media partner, a pivotal move in advancing its One ELC operating model. This model, aimed at enhancing efficiency, speed, and overall growth, represents a notable step forward. The Company's implementation of One ELC also signifies a major achievement within its Profit Recovery and Growth Plan's (PRGP) Restructuring Program, a vital component of the Beauty Reimagined strategy. This strategic decision is integral to the Company's ongoing commitment to optimizing performance and maximizing potential.

data.title: Inc. Names Total Office Solutions to Its 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Southwest
data.description: In Irving, Texas, Total Office Solutions has achieved a significant milestone by being featured in the prestigious Inc. 2026 List of the Fastest-Growing Private Companies in the Southwest. This recognition highlights the remarkable growth and success of Total Office Solutions in the region. The inclusion in this list underscores the company's commitment to excellence and innovation in its business operations. Being part of this exclusive list showcases the company's rapid expansion and success in the industry.

data.title: The Cheesecake Factory Named to Fortune’s ‘100 Best Companies to Work For’ List for Thirteenth Time
data.description: A California-based company, The Cheesecake Factory® (NASDAQ: CAKE), has once again achieved recognition as one of the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® for the thirteenth consecutive year. This prestigious honor is bestowed by Fortune media and Great Place to Work®, with The Cheesecake Factory securing the 25th spot on the list. The accolade is reserved for organizations that cultivate a culture of trust, generosity, and high performance for their employees. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to providing a positive and supportive work environment for its staff.

data.title: Ero Copper to Release First Quarter 2026 Operating and Financial Results on May 4, 2026
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Ero Copper Corp. (TSX: ERO, NYSE: ERO) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 operating and financial results on May 4, 2026, after market close. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for May 5, 2026, at 11:30am Eastern time. This will also be available via webcast link and on the Company's website.
